title: Create Strongbox
description:
Create focused without all the interruptions.

The go-to easy solutions aren't an option. How will you build your factory logistics, power, and storage lines?
body:
Create focused without all the interruptions.
Drawers, enderchests, teleporting? Those go-to easy solutions aren't an option here. How will you build your factory logistics, power, and storage lines?

Adds some kubejs recipes partially based on concepts in the [Create Renewable Ores](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-renewable-ores) datapack by F53, which in turn was based on the [CreatePlus](https://github.com/JieningYu/CreatePlus-mod/) mod by JieningYu.
Adds diamond sand paper based on the concept in [Create Crafts & Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createaddition) using original assets.

Not Included but Recommended:
[Create Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
